judgment.summary: Dominant market position with strong growth, high margins, and robust cash flow, albeit at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 8.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Revenue growth 13.2% YoY and earnings growth 19.2% YoY show strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin 52.6%, operating margin 36.0%, and profit margin 29.7% indicate exceptional profitability.
Return on equity 52.2% and return on assets 15.7% demonstrate efficient use of capital.
Free cash flow (TTM) $8.24B is substantial, supporting operations and shareholder returns.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target price above the current spot price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 52.94 and Price/Book of 1409.96 suggest a very high valuation.
PEG ratio of 2.32 indicates that the stock may be overvalued relative to its earnings growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 12.99 is high, though offset by strong cash reserves and free cash flow.
Quick ratio of 0.69 suggests potential short-term liquidity challenges if inventory cannot be sold quickly.

news.paragraph: ASML is being highlighted as a top tech stock with a wide economic moat, appearing in billionaire Ken Fisher's portfolio. The company's position in the AI sector is noted, suggesting strong competitive advantages. While no immediate catalyst is apparent, the ongoing focus on its market leadership and AI relevance provides a positive backdrop.

headlines.title: ASML (ASML): AI Stock With The Widest Moat?
This is Why ASML Holding NV (ASML) is One of the Top Tech Stocks in Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
